report.summary: Community growth cycle v5: identified best-perpetual-dex-guide and ethena-usde-guide as top new-content trajectories; drafted 8-post Hyperliquid perp thread, Ethena USDe tweet, Meme Launchpads tweet, Sonic tweet, Discord/Telegram announcement for all 7 new guides, and Thursday newsletter section; created 2 SVG social cards (Ethena USDe delta-hedge flow card + Meme Launchpads market-share comparison card) saved to /public/.

sections.title: Social Content Drafted
items: Twitter thread (8 posts): Best Perpetual DEX Guide — hook on Hyperliquid's 80% market share dominance, perp mechanics explained, Hyperliquid on-chain order book differentiator, dYdX/Lighter/GRVT/GMX comparison, risk breakdown, 3-step getting started guide, CTA to /learn/best-perpetual-dex-guide

Tweet: Ethena USDe — delta-hedge mechanism in plain English (deposit ETH → short $ETH perp → earn staking yield + funding rate), sUSDe 'Internet Bond' framing, $6.7B TVL signal, risk acknowledgment, CTA to /learn/ethena-usde-guide
Tweet: Best Meme Coin Launchpads 2026 — Pump.fun $1B revenue milestone as hook, fragmented multi-chain meta (LetsBonk/Clanker/Zora/four.meme), CTA to /learn/best-meme-coin-launchpads-2026
Tweet: Sonic Blockchain — Fantom → Sonic rebrand story, 400K TPS / 720ms / <$0.0001 fees / FeeM 90% dev rev share, CTA to /learn/sonic-blockchain-guide
Discord/Telegram announcement: all 7 new guides (2 live + 5 in queue) with slugs and one-liner descriptions, 'no wallet needed' callout

Newsletter section (Thursday send): Subject 'DeFi is having its moment — 7 new guides' — market pulse ($71K BTC, $2,088 ETH, $22.6B perp volume, $6.7B Ethena TVL), 4 featured guides (perp DEX + ethena + sonic + meme launchpads), 2 worth-reading picks (Pendle + GENIUS Act), degen corner on Hyperliquid's fully on-chain order book thesis

sections.title: Visual Assets Created
items: social-ethena-usde-guide.svg — 1200×630 social card: 3-step delta-hedge flow diagram (deposit ETH → short $ETH perp → stake for sUSDe yield), 3 stat cards ($6.7B TVL / 10-40% APY / $79M 90d revenue), branded glass-morphism card surfaces, green/cyan/amber accent palette, 'Internet Bond' result badge, URL footer. Saved to /public/

social-best-meme-coin-launchpads.svg — 1200×630 social card: horizontal market-share bar chart (Pump.fun 57% / LetsBonk 24% / Clanker 14% / four.meme 3%), right-panel 5-platform at-a-glance table with chain badges and status labels (LEADER/RISING/NICHE/BNB META/TRON META), pink→amber→yellow title gradient, 3 market stat pills (Pump.fun $1B+ revenue / 11.9M+ tokens / $101.8B daily volume). Saved to /public/

sections.title: Analytics Context
items: Site is Day 15 — no Google Search Console data yet; trajectory model based on content quality, keyword intent, timeliness, and market signals
Hyperliquid dominance ($18B+/day, 80% perp DEX market share) is the defining DeFi narrative of Q1 2026 — highest social amplification potential of any guide shipped this cycle
Ethena USDe just published (live on degen0x.com) — sUSDe yield story is viral-capable among DeFi-native audience; interactive EthenaYieldCalc drives engagement and time-on-page
Sonic Blockchain just published (live) — Fantom rebrand narrative has built-in audience from former Fantom community + new SonicVM tech story
Best Meme Coin Launchpads guide targets CoinGecko's #1 top 2026 narrative; Pump.fun $1B milestone gives a strong hook for social engagement
7 guides built this cycle (2 published, 5 in PUBLISH_QUEUE); total live pages now 352+
Previous cycle (v4) covered: crypto-tax-guide-2026, ethereum-pectra-upgrade-guide, dca-calculator — all social posts this cycle are net new coverage
